CustomMetadata.label: UA-004 - Permission Set granting API access to standard users

values.value: Permission Set granting API access to standard users

A standalone permission set with PermissionsApiEnabled=true is assigned to active standard users. Standard users with API access can bypass the Salesforce UI and extract or manipulate data programmatically.
API access bypasses UI controls such as page layouts, required fields, and record-level validation. An attacker with stolen credentials and API access can perform bulk data extraction silently.

Remove PermissionsApiEnabled from permission sets assigned to standard users. Use dedicated integration-only users with Named Credentials for API access. Reserve API access for identified integration accounts.
